case_title: S CHANDLER VISHER VS. RONALD WARD

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-17-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY. THE JUN-21-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-21-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-07-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-15-2011 CONTINUED TO SEP-16-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
